pack.askAbout.label: Ask about this model
pack.askAbout.question: Tell me about this domain pack. What entities, metrics, and relationships does it model, and what kinds of questions can I ask?
pack.kv.name: name
pack.unsat.title: Unsatisfiable
pack.unsat.problemText.one: This metric references one reference that is not defined in the pack:
pack.unsat.problemText.many: This metric references references that are not defined in the pack:
pack.unsat.missingRefHint: missing — no measure or dimension with this name
pack.planner.refuses: the planner refuses questions touching this metric
pack.ghost.description.one: This reference is expected by {n} metric but is not defined as a measure or dimension in the pack.
pack.ghost.description.many: This reference is expected by {n} metrics but is not defined as a measure or dimension in the pack.
